description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage and a pages job. The pages job runs only on the gh-pages branch, uses the default Docker image, and executes the shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, mv .public public, and echo "created public dir for html pages". It stores the resulting public/ directory as an artifact with path public for GitLab Pages deployment. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
